# SleepingOnTheEdge

> Cutting-edge sleep science, honest product breakdowns, and the edge you need to actually sleep better. Independent, research-backed, no BS.

SleepingOnTheEdge is an independent sleep optimization resource. We curate product recommendations from aggregated customer reviews across Amazon, Walmart, and sleep communities, and write research-backed guides on sleep science topics.

## Content Types

- **Roundups** (/best/): Curated product picks ranked by aggregated buyer reviews
- **Reviews** (/reviews/): In-depth single-product breakdowns based on verified buyer feedback
- **Guides** (/guides/): Research-backed articles on sleep science, habits, and optimization
- **Tools** (/tools/): Free interactive calculators (sleep cycle, caffeine cutoff, sleep quiz)
- **Comparisons** (/compare/): Head-to-head product matchups
- **Glossary** (/glossary/): Plain-English definitions of sleep science terms

## Key Topics

Sleep optimization, circadian rhythm, sleep trackers, sound machines, weighted blankets, blue light blocking, mattresses, bedding, sleep supplements, sleep disorders, sleep hygiene, bedroom environment optimization

## Product Coverage

53 sleep products across categories: sleep tech, bedding, light management, sound machines, sleep trackers, mattresses, pillows, cooling systems, earplugs, and more.

## Editorial Standards

- Product picks based on aggregated customer reviews, not paid placement
- Health/medical content includes disclaimers and cites peer-reviewed research
- Affiliate-supported (Amazon Associates) — commissions never influence rankings
- Sources include: Journal of Behavioral Medicine, Sports Medicine, Sleep, Advances in Preventive Medicine, American Academy of Sleep Medicine guidelines

## Contact
